fetched_note: Snapshot of portfolio sections. Re-run scripts/fetch_portfolio.py to refresh if the site changes.

sections.work_experience: Lead SDET at TekSystems (ScienceLogic, 2025): architected a Pytest-based data validation framework with factory fixtures, ClickHouse and SSH connectivity, credentials management, and Allure/XRAY reporting. Engineering Lead at Ness Digital Engineering (S&P Global, 2024-2025): led QA for multi-service RMBS workflows combining Selenium + Pytest UI automation, API testing, Azure DevOps test management, and integration coverage. Senior Test Automation Engineer at EPAM Systems (2023-2024): built PySpark validation scripts and schema-agnostic checks for 300M+ record migrations, plus LLM prompt evaluation and GenAI backend work. Consultant at VTest Software / Sentient.io (2022-2023): designed a data-driven Behave + Selenium framework for a multilingual portal with 100+ web services and cross-device regression coverage.
sections.projects: Schema-Agnostic API and Data Validation (ScienceLogic): Pytest framework using factory fixtures, ClickHouse/SSH connectivity, credential handling, Allure/XRAY reporting, and adaptable schema checks. RMBS Multi-Service QA (S&P Global): end-to-end QA across complex RMBS workflows with Selenium + Pytest UI automation, API testing, ADO test management, and UAT support. Big Data Validation and LLM Evaluation (Altrata and Uber): PySpark scripts for 300M+ record migration validation, schema contract checks, Airflow orchestration, and GenAI prompt evaluation rubrics. BDD Regression Framework (Sentient.io): Selenium POM + Behave framework for a multilingual portal, BrowserStack coverage, dead-link detection, and localization validation. AgenticQAWorkflows: LangChain, LangGraph, Ollama, OpenAI, and MCP server workflows for Playwright, GitHub, filesystem, and database-assisted QA. Training Portal Suite: Django REST Framework CRUD app with Swagger/ReDoc, Playwright API validation, GitHub Actions, and AI-assisted test generation. Epex Spot Test Suite: Playwright + Pytest suite for scraping, validating, and writing half-hourly market data with integrity checks before CSV output. Playwright JS POM Framework: JavaScript Playwright framework with POM architecture, pages/tests/utils layers, configuration, and setup scripts.
sections.frameworks_delivered: Contract-First Big Data Validation: mapped evolving schemas into Git-versioned contracts loaded at runtime through factory fixtures, enabling reusable PySpark validation across 9 pipelines. BDD Regression Framework: built a Selenium POM + Behave framework for multilingual portal automation, BrowserStack coverage, Allure reporting, dead-link detection, and localization validation. LLM Prompt Evaluation: created structured rubrics for evaluating prompt clarity, accuracy, context, safety, hallucination risk, consistency, and comparative LLM response quality.
sections.skills: Languages: Python, SQL, Gherkin, C/C++, Java, Perl. Automation and Testing: Playwright Python, Selenium, Requests, Pytest, Behave, Robot Framework, PySpark, UI/API/Data/ETL/LLM testing. Frameworks and APIs: Django, Flask, Django REST Framework, OpenAI API, BDD/Behave, Great Expectations, LangChain, LangGraph. Cloud and DevOps: AWS S3, RDS, Glue, Athena, EC2, Databricks, Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Airflow. Databases: PostgreSQL, ClickHouse, Oracle, MSSQL, SQLite. Tools: Git, Jira, XRAY, Allure, Postman, PyCharm, Confluence, VS Code, Cursor, Codex, BrowserStack, LambdaTest.
sections.training_certifications: Generative AI Mastermind (Outskill, Jan 2026). SL1 Expert Certificate (ScienceLogic, Sep 2025). Agile Methodologies (Skillsoft, Dec 2024). Generative AI APIs for Practical Applications (Skillsoft, Dec 2024). Getting Started with Prompt Engineering (Skillsoft, Dec 2024). Introduction to Mobile Testing Fundamentals (Skillsoft, Dec 2024). Using OpenAI APIs from Python (Skillsoft, Dec 2024). Test Automation with Python (LinkedIn Learning, Mar 2024). Cypress and Test Automation (EPAM Systems).
sections.education: M.Tech, Applied Optics, IIT Delhi, 9.65/10, Institute Rank 1. M.Sc., Electronics, Hindu College, Delhi University, University Rank 1. B.Sc., Physics, Hindu College, Delhi University, 84.44%.

Altrata: architect acknowledged technical strength, innovation, and ability to mentor the whole team.
